text:
The lead supervisory authority shall, without delay, communicate the relevant information on the matter to the
other supervisory authorities concerned.
obligation_gt: communicate the relevant information on the matter to the other supervisory authorities concerned

text:
Where point (a) of Article 6(1) applies, in relation to the offer of information society services directly to a child,
the processing of the personal data of a child shall be lawful where the child is at least 16 years old.
subject_gt: entity offering information society services directly to a child
obligation_gt: ensure processing of personal data of a child is lawful
condition_gt: where point (a) of Article 6(1) applies and in relation to the offer of information society services directly to a child
threshold_gt: child is at least 16 years old

text:
A law as a basis for several processing operations based on a
legal obligation to which the controller is subject or where processing is necessary for the performance of a task
carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of an official authority may be sufficient.
obligation_gt: may use a law as basis for processing operations
condition_gt: processing is based on legal obligation to which the controller is subject or processing is necessary for performance of task carried out in public interest or exercise of official authority

text:
The decision referred to in paragraph 1 shall be reasoned and addressed to the lead
supervisory authority and all the supervisory authorities concerned and binding on them.
subject_gt: the decision referred to in paragraph 1
obligation_gt: shall be reasoned and addressed to the lead supervisory authority and all the supervisory authorities concerned and binding on them

text: Where Article 3(2) applies, the controller or the processor shall designate in writing a representative in the Union.
obligation_gt: shall designate in writing a representative in the Union
condition_gt: Where Article 3(2) applies

text:
Paragraph 1 shall not apply if the decision:
(a) is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller;
obligation_gt: Paragraph 1 shall not apply
condition_gt: if the decision is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller
exception_gt: decision is necessary for entering into, or performance of, a contract between the data subject and a data controller

text:
In exercising his or her right to data portability pursuant to paragraph 1, the data subject shall have the right to
have the personal data transmitted directly from one controller to another, where technically feasible.
obligation_gt: shall have the right to have the personal data transmitted directly from one controller to another
condition_gt: In exercising his or her right to data portability pursuant to paragraph 1, where technically feasible

text:
The controller shall take appropriate measures to provide any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and
any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing to the data subject in a concise, transparent,
intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language, in particular for any information addressed
specifically to a child.
obligation_gt: shall take appropriate measures to provide any information referred to in Articles 13 and 14 and any communication under Articles 15 to 22 and 34 relating to processing to the data subject in a concise, transparent, intelligible and easily accessible form, using clear and plain language
condition_gt: relating to processing to the data subject

text:
The binding decision shall concern all the matters which are the subject of the relevant and
reasoned objection, in particular whether there is an infringement of this Regulation;
obligation_gt: The binding decision shall concern all the matters which are the subject of the relevant and reasoned objection, in particular whether there is an infringement of this Regulation
condition_gt: relevant and reasoned objection exists

text: The data subject shall have the right to withdraw his or her consent at any time.
obligation_gt: shall have the right to withdraw his or her consent
condition_gt: at any time

text: Information exchanged shall be used only for the purpose for which it was requested.
obligation_gt: use information exchanged only for the purpose for which it was requested
condition_gt: when information is exchanged

text:
Member States shall lay down the rules on other penalties applicable to infringements of this Regulation in
particular for infringements which are not subject to administrative fines pursuant to Article 83, and shall take all
measures necessary to ensure that they are implemented.
obligation_gt: shall lay down the rules on other penalties applicable to infringements of this Regulation and shall take all measures necessary to ensure that they are implemented
condition_gt: for infringements which are not subject to administrative fines pursuant to Article 83

text:
The controller or processor shall document the assessment as well as the suitable safeguards referred to in the
second subparagraph of paragraph 1 of this Article in the records referred to in Article 30.
obligation_gt: shall document the assessment as well as the suitable safeguards referred to in the second subparagraph of paragraph 1 of this Article in the records referred to in Article 30

text:
Point (f) of the first subparagraph shall not apply to processing carried out by public authorities in the performance of
their tasks.
obligation_gt: exemption from Point (f) of the first subparagraph
condition_gt: processing carried out in the performance of their tasks
exception_gt: Point (f) of the first subparagraph shall not apply

text:
Without prejudice to Article 55, the supervisory authority of the main establishment or of the single establishment
of the controller or processor shall be competent to act as lead supervisory authority for the cross-border processing
carried out by that controller or processor in accordance with the procedure provided in Article 60.
subject_gt: supervisory authority of the main establishment or of the single establishment of the controller or processor
obligation_gt: shall be competent to act as lead supervisory authority for the cross-border processing carried out by that controller or processor in accordance with the procedure provided in Article 60
condition_gt: cross-border processing carried out by that controller or processor

text:
Where a draft code of conduct relates to processing activities in several Member States, the supervisory authority
which is competent pursuant to Article 55 shall, before approving the draft code, amendment or extension, submit it in
the procedure referred to in Article 63 to the Board which shall provide an opinion on whether the draft code,
amendment or extension complies with this Regulation or, in the situation referred to in paragraph 3 of this Article,
provides appropriate safeguards.
subject_gt: supervisory authority which is competent pursuant to Article 55
obligation_gt: submit the draft code, amendment or extension in the procedure referred to in Article 63 to the Board before approving it
condition_gt: where a draft code of conduct relates to processing activities in several Member States
deadline_gt: before approving the draft code, amendment or extension

text:
Where the personal data are collected from the
data subject, the data subject should also be informed whether he or she is obliged to provide the personal data
and of the consequences, where he or she does not provide such data.
obligation_gt: inform the data subject whether he or she is obliged to provide the personal data and of the consequences where he or she does not provide such data
condition_gt: where the personal data are collected from the data subject

text:
Therefore, this Regulation should provide for
harmonised conditions for the processing of special categories of personal data concerning health, in respect of
specific needs, in particular where the processing of such data is carried out for certain health-related purposes
4.5.2016 EN Official Journal of the European Union L 119/11
by persons subject to a legal obligation of professional secrecy.
subject_gt: persons subject to a legal obligation of professional secrecy
obligation_gt: provide for harmonised conditions for the processing of special categories of personal data concerning health
condition_gt: in respect of specific needs, in particular where the processing of such data is carried out for certain health-related purposes

text:
The Union or the Member State law shall meet an objective of
public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued.
subject_gt: The Union or the Member State law
obligation_gt: shall meet an objective of public interest and be proportionate to the legitimate aim pursued

text:
Article 19
Notification obligation regarding rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of
processing
The controller shall communicate any rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in
accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18 to each recipient to whom the personal data have been
disclosed, unless this proves impossible or involves disproportionate effort.
obligation_gt: shall communicate any rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18 to each recipient to whom the personal data have been disclosed
condition_gt: rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing carried out in accordance with Article 16, Article 17(1) and Article 18
exception_gt: unless this proves impossible or involves disproportionate effort

text:
The controller shall no longer process the personal data unless the controller demonstrates
compelling legitimate grounds for the processing which override the interests, rights and freedoms of the data subject or
for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims.
obligation_gt: shall no longer process the personal data
exception_gt: unless the controller demonstrates compelling legitimate grounds for the processing which override the interests, rights and freedoms of the data subject or for the establishment, exercise or defence of legal claims

text:
Those implementing acts shall be adopted in accordance with
the examination procedure referred to in Article 93(2).
obligation_gt: shall be adopted in accordance with the examination procedure referred to in Article 93(2)

text:
Where the lead supervisory authority decides not to handle the case, the supervisory authority which informed the
lead supervisory authority shall handle it according to Articles 61 and 62.
subject_gt: the supervisory authority which informed the lead supervisory authority
obligation_gt: shall handle it according to Articles 61 and 62
condition_gt: Where the lead supervisory authority decides not to handle the case

text:
However, such transmission in the legitimate interest of the
controller or further processing of personal data should be prohibited if the processing is not compatible with a
legal, professional or other binding obligation of secrecy.
obligation_gt: transmission in the legitimate interest of the controller or further processing of personal data should be prohibited
condition_gt: if the processing is not compatible with a legal, professional or other binding obligation of secrecy

text:
The member or members of each supervisory authority shall, in the performance of their tasks and exercise of
their powers in accordance with this Regulation, remain free from external influence, whether direct or indirect, and
shall neither seek nor take instructions from anybody.
subject_gt: member or members of each supervisory authority
obligation_gt: remain free from external influence and neither seek nor take instructions from anybody
condition_gt: in the performance of their tasks and exercise of their powers in accordance with this Regulation

text:
Section 3
Rectification and erasure
Article 16
Right to rectification
The data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller without undue delay the rectification of inaccurate
personal data concerning him or her.
obligation_gt: provide rectification of inaccurate personal data
condition_gt: upon request from data subject

obligation_gt: communicate the draft decision to the Board
condition_gt: when it aims to adopt a list of the processing operations subject to the requirement for a data protection impact assessment pursuant to Article 35(4)

text:
Where none of the other supervisory authorities concerned has objected to the draft decision submitted by the
lead supervisory authority within the period referred to in paragraphs 4 and 5, the lead supervisory authority and the
supervisory authorities concerned shall be deemed to be in agreement with that draft decision and shall be bound by it.
subject_gt: lead supervisory authority and the supervisory authorities concerned
obligation_gt: shall be deemed to be in agreement with that draft decision and shall be bound by it
condition_gt: Where none of the other supervisory authorities concerned has objected to the draft decision submitted by the lead supervisory authority within the period referred to in paragraphs 4 and 5
deadline_gt: within the period referred to in paragraphs 4 and 5

text:
The Member State in whose territory the damage was caused shall make good such damage under the conditions
applicable to damage caused by its own staff.
subject_gt: The Member State in whose territory the damage was caused
obligation_gt: shall make good such damage under the conditions applicable to damage caused by its own staff
condition_gt: damage was caused in the Member State's territory

text:
The supervisory authority shall provide an opinion on whether the
draft code, amendment or extension complies with this Regulation and shall approve that draft code, amendment or
extension if it finds that it provides sufficient appropriate safeguards.
obligation_gt: shall provide an opinion on whether the draft code, amendment or extension complies with this Regulation and shall approve that draft code, amendment or extension
condition_gt: if it finds that it provides sufficient appropriate safeguards

text:
The controller shall inform the data subject
about those recipients if the data subject requests it.
obligation_gt: shall inform the data subject about those recipients
condition_gt: if the data subject requests it

text: The certification shall be voluntary and available via a process that is transparent.
obligation_gt: The certification shall be voluntary and available via a process that is transparent

text:
Supervisory authorities shall not be competent to supervise processing operations of courts acting in their judicial
capacity.
obligation_gt: shall not be competent to supervise processing operations
condition_gt: of courts acting in their judicial capacity

text:
The representative shall be established in one of the Member States where the data subjects, whose personal data
are processed in relation to the offering of goods or services to them, or whose behaviour is monitored, are.
obligation_gt: shall be established in one of the Member States
condition_gt: where the data subjects, whose personal data are processed in relation to the offering of goods or services to them, or whose behaviour is monitored, are

text:
The annual report shall include a review of the practical application of the guidelines, recommendations and best
practices referred to in point (l) of Article 70(1) as well as of the binding decisions referred to in Article 65.
obligation_gt: include a review of the practical application of the guidelines, recommendations and best practices referred to in point (l) of Article 70(1) as well as of the binding decisions referred to in Article 65
condition_gt: The annual report

text:
Court proceedings for exercising the right to receive compensation shall be brought before the courts competent
under the law of the Member State referred to in Article 79(2).
subject_gt: Court proceedings for exercising the right to receive compensation
obligation_gt: shall be brought before the courts competent under the law of the Member State referred to in Article 79(2)
condition_gt: for exercising the right to receive compensation

text:
4.5.2016 EN Official Journal of the European Union L 119/5
(23) In order to ensure that natural persons are not deprived of the protection to which they are entitled under this
Regulation, the processing of personal data of data subjects who are in the Union by a controller or a processor
not established in the Union should be subject to this Regulation where the processing activities are related to
offering goods or services to such data subjects irrespective of whether connected to a payment.

obligation_gt: processing of personal data of data subjects who are in the Union should be subject to this Regulation
condition_gt: where the processing activities are related to offering goods or services to such data subjects irrespective of whether connected to a payment

text:
The final
decision of the supervisory authorities concerned shall be adopted under the terms of Article 60(7), (8) and (9).
obligation_gt: adopt the final decision under the terms of Article 60(7), (8) and (9)

text:
The Board shall draw up an annual report regarding the protection of natural persons with regard to processing in

condition_gt: in the Union and, where relevant, in third countries and international organisations

text: Where the icons are presented electronically they shall be machine-readable.

text:
The

authority.

obligation_gt: shall be subject to the Member State law of the host supervisory authority

text:
That documentation shall enable the supervisory authority to verify
compliance with this Article.

text:
Information provided under Articles 13 and 14 and any communication and any actions taken under Articles 15

text:
A data subject who has obtained restriction of processing pursuant to paragraph 1 shall be informed by the

text:
In the context of the evaluations and reviews referred to in paragraph 1, the Commission shall examine, in
particular, the application and functioning of:
(a) Chapter V on the transfer of personal data to third countries or international organisations with particular regard to

Directive 95/46/EC;

describe the nature of the personal data breach including where possible, the categories and approximate number of data subjects concerned and the categories and approximate number of personal data records concerned

text:
The
supervisory authority shall inform the controller and, where applicable, the processor, of any such extension within one
month of receipt of the request for consultation together with the reasons for the delay.

text:
Where processing is based on consent, the controller shall be able to demonstrate that the data subject has

text:
The supervisory authority shall establish and make public a list of the kind of processing operations which are
